claim_nature_lanes.name: Lookup, construction, and invariant-scope split
claim_nature_lanes.why_missing: Library-action lookup evidence can be present while stronger invariant, glue-coset, Gamma72, or physical interpretation claims still need their own receipts.
claim_nature_lanes.populate: Route lattice-forge APIs and receipt paths into the local burden table, then keep expanded invariants as separate next needs.

claim_nature_lanes.name: Standard physics formalism not attached
claim_nature_lanes.why_missing: Carrier, vacancy, excitation, energy, and material terms are often treated as novel because the standard electron-hole-exciton or calibration formalism is not quoted beside the CQE statement.
claim_nature_lanes.populate: Attach NP-12/NP-13 correspondence rows and separate addressability claims from calibrated physical claims.

claim_nature_lanes.name: Receipts and governance treated as non-mathematical
claim_nature_lanes.why_missing: Schemas, ledgers, reproducibility locks, admission filters, and status preservation are formal-methods evidence, but some papers still carry them as prose obligations.
claim_nature_lanes.populate: Attach NSIT, receipt catalog, CAM, and standards-board evidence as formal artifacts instead of leaving them as loose editorial notes.

claim_nature_lanes.name: Negative and failed-route receipts not reused
claim_nature_lanes.why_missing: Failed verifier routes and rejected data are useful constraints, but they are often stranded outside the paper that needs the exclusion boundary.
claim_nature_lanes.populate: Route negative receipts into burden tables as exclusion evidence and counterexample guards.

claim_nature_lanes.name: Finite verification mixed with unbounded claim language
claim_nature_lanes.why_missing: Finite-state, bounded-search, and local-rule checks are real closures, but they become invisible when the row is phrased as an unbounded theorem.
claim_nature_lanes.populate: Split bounded computational receipts from unbounded/minimality/generalization burdens.

claim_nature_lanes.name: Static structure mixed with temporal protocol
claim_nature_lanes.why_missing: Static templates, observer rows, and retrospective readouts need separate lanes from temporal evolution, simultaneity, or causal protocol claims.
claim_nature_lanes.populate: Add explicit static/protocol slots and route later temporal receipts back through those slots.

claim_nature_lanes.name: Applied forge internal/external validation split
claim_nature_lanes.why_missing: Descriptor generation, candidate ranking, and lookup surfaces can be internal tool claims while wet-lab, fabrication, biological, or calibrated energy claims remain external-validation needs.
claim_nature_lanes.populate: Attach applied-forge workbook rows and split internal descriptors from external validation requirements.
